uses: Simbuleta abyssinica has been traditionally used in Ethiopian folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to be used in the treatment of various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. However, further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for medical use. In some cases, Simbuleta abyssinica is also used as a natural remedy for wound healing and inflammation. More studies are required to fully understand the plant's medicinal potential.
